title: Palestinian Man Recounts Brutal Sexual Assault by Israeli Settlers
summary_full: The man said his attackers stripped him naked, beat him and zip-tied his genitalia, an account corroborated by family members and a rights activist who were also beaten.
summary_public: The man said his attackers stripped him naked, beat him and zip-tied his genitalia, an account corroborated by family members and a rights activist who were also beaten.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Brutal Sexual Assault by Israeli Settlers
